task_description: FOLIO: the strategy must generate plain text first (unconstrained), then " << " then exactly one first-order logic formula (Prover9 grammar: {forall}, {exists}, predicates, {and}, {or}, {not}, {implies}, {iff}, {xor}), then " >>". Use UnconstrainedStep for the plain-text part; use ConstrainedStep only for the segment between the delimiters. Respect the grammar only between the delimiters. All structure instructions are in the prompt.
